theme: channel code tuned to a known noise fingerprint
title: Codebook Tuned to a Published Burst-Error Fingerprint
strategies: checker-reproduction baseline: a spread interleaved comb code with deliberately loose (larger than necessary) spacing
naive block code: dedicate one contiguous run of bits per message-index-bit, maximizing raw pairwise Hamming distance while ignoring the shape of the burst sweep
tight interleaved comb code: spread each message-index-bit across an arithmetic-progression comb with spacing exactly large enough to exceed every swept burst length
